DISPATCH_TASK
role: Reasonix-DB
task_id: TASK-022
target_project: A_Share_Monitor / market_data
source_ref: TASK-007 commit 7c168999b6a583ca20a325098cc2111de311a1a1 tree 93af3e1f2df82c80a00598a35ae3e602130a45bd; TASK-008 commit 413829f0179c5142e26f57594d52e1b6de9c338f tree bc2cc31f3c6b6c571ee7d2352dc71eb1a68e78e4
task_packet: tasks/backlog/task-022-a-share-l1-capability-repair-plan/handoff.md
context_delta: ChatGPT external audit accepted the recorded-execution packet and requested a P0 repair plan for A-share L1 snapshot a_expand_20260704_l1_local1000_0317. Snapshot has 1000 symbols, 2,059,000 canonical rows, date range 20180102..20260701, readiness WARNING / Level 1, suspension status WARNING_EVENT_TABLE_EMPTY, limit price status WARNING_LOW_COVERAGE, phase3_evidence_ready=false, micro_recommendation_data_ready_with_warnings=false.
expected_output: Produce a read-only DB repair plan. Must answer: what table/source should provide suspension events; why limit price coverage is low; whether data exists in local DB but is not canonicalized; whether network ingest is required; what exact DB ops task is needed next. Also provide a compact JSON object with keys status, required_sources, likely_root_causes, local_db_checks, network_required, next_db_ops_task, forbidden_actions, non_authorization.
transcript_path: reports/workspace_dispatch/reasonix_db_task_022_20260704.jsonl
boundary: L0 research plan only. No source edits, no DB writes, no network ingest, no readiness claim, no recommendation, no HITL ticket, no broker/order/paper/live/auto, no secrets.
human_gate: not required for this L0 plan; any L1-L4 future execution requires unique HG-EXEC-TASK-* before execution.

I'll start by reading the task handoff and the project registry to understand the snapshot details and the current database structure.
